title: A–Z of information releases | Stats NZ
content:
## A–Z of information releases
30 July 2025, 11:30am
This page lists all the information releases we produce.
Select a title from the list to see the recent information releases for that subject.
Each information release contains the latest statistics for the subject, with key facts, statistical tables, and related metadata and definitions.
2018 Census 2013 Census 2006 Census 2001 Census 1996 Census
Abortion statistics – we have discontinued this release. The last statistics published were for 2019. Accommodation survey – we have discontinued this release. The last results published were for the September 2019 month. Agricultural production statistics Alcohol available for consumption Annual balance sheets Annual enterprise survey Area unit population projections
Balance of payments and international investment position Births and deaths Building consents issued Business operations survey Business price indexes
Child and youth prosecution statistics Child poverty statistics Consumers price index (CPI) Criminal conviction and sentencing statistics Cruise ship traveller and expenditure statistics
Disability survey Dwelling and household estimates
Economic survey of manufacturing Effects of COVID-19 on trade Electronic card transactions Employment indicators Environmental-economic accounts
Family and household projections Food price index
Geographic boundary data annual release Goods and services trade by country (from 2 September 2020, see International trade ) Government finance statistics (general government) Greenhouse gas emissions (industry and household) Gross domestic product (GDP)
Household economic survey (income) Household expenditure statistics Household income and housing-cost statistics Household labour force survey estimated working-age population Household living-costs price indexes Household net worth statistics
Information and communication technology supply survey Injury statistics – work-related claims International migration (previous International travel and migration releases remain available) International trade (previous Goods and services trade by country and Overseas trade indexes (prices and volumes) releases remain available) International travel (previous International visitor arrivals to New Zealand releases remain available) Internet service provider survey
Labour market statistics Labour market statistics (disability) (from 2024 see Labour market statistics ) Labour market statistics (income) Linked employer-employee data (LEED) Livestock slaughtering statistics Local authority financial statistics Local authority statistics
Māori population estimates Marriages, civil unions, and divorces
National accounts (change in assets) National accounts (income and expenditure) National accounts (industry production and investment) National accounts input-output tables National ethnic population projections National and subnational period life tables National family and household projections (from 2019 see Family and household projections ) National labour force projections National population estimates National population projections New Zealand abridged period life table (from 2021 see Births and deaths ) New Zealand business demography statistics New Zealand cohort life tables New Zealand energy use New Zealand period life tables (from 2017 see National and subnational period life tables ) New Zealand's environmental reporting series
Overseas merchandise trade Overseas trade indexes (prices and volumes) (from 2 September 2020, see International trade )
Post-enumeration survey Primary production – poultry Prison (sentence remand and post-prison) and community-sentence statistics Productivity statistics Property transfer statistics
Ready-mixed concrete, secondary production (SEP) Regional gross domestic product Rental price indexes Research and development survey Retail trade survey
Screen industry Selected price indexes Selected services survey Serious injury outcome indicators Statistical area 2 population projections Subnational ethnic population projections Subnational family and household projections (from 2019 see Family and household projections ) Subnational period life tables Subnational population estimates Subnational population projections
Tatauranga umanga Māori – Statistics on Māori businesses (te reo Māori and English) Te Kupenga (te reo Māori and English) Tourism satellite account Transport vehicle registrations
